conversion_policy.ligand_policy: write generated candidate coordinates to minimal PDBQT while preserving candidate_id
conversion_policy.protonation_assumption: preserve source receptor hydrogens; do not add ligand hydrogens
conversion_policy.receptor_policy: copy existing PDBQT when present; otherwise convert parseable PDB ATOM/HETATM records to minimal PDBQT
conversion_policy.sanitization_assumption: finite-coordinate validation only; RDKit sanitization remains a separate metric backend

ligand.sanitization_assumption: candidate coordinates accepted if finite; no chemistry sanitization performed here
